goal: 增加外部 submission manifest 命令

summary.title: 增加外部 submission manifest 命令
summary.what: 新增 release:submission:manifest 命令和测试，从 MV3 submission zip 读取 manifest.json、packaged files 和 SHA256，生成机器可读 JSON handoff；同步 external release submission packet，要求上传前生成 manifest 并在提交结果里记录 uploaded_manifest。
summary.why: 当前主线是 cutover delivery。外部 submission 不应只依赖 Markdown 手工抄录，机器可读 manifest 能把 artifact、manifest 摘要、文件列表和 channel 状态固定下来，减少上传/交接错误。
summary.user_goal: 增加外部 submission manifest 命令

decisions.chose: 直接读取 packaged zip 内的 manifest.json 和 zip entry 列表
decisions.rationale: 外部提交上传的是 zip，handoff manifest 应证明上传物本身，而不是本地 dist 目录的近似状态。
rejected: 只从 apps/mv3-shell/dist 读取文件
继续只在 Markdown 里维护文件列表

decisions.chose: 新增 release:submission:manifest，默认输出 JSON，也支持 --output 写入 .ml-cache/release-artifacts
decisions.rationale: 保持外部 submission artifact 不入库，同时让交付方能生成可附带上传/审查的 manifest 文件。

decisions.chose: 只推进 external submission handoff，不新增 deferred product breadth
decisions.rationale: cutover gate 仍绿，当前缺口是交付操作可执行性，不是产品能力缺口。

review_notes: TDD 验证：先运行 focused spec 看到缺少 release-submission-manifest 模块失败，再实现脚本并观察同一测试通过。
验证通过：bun run test -- apps/mv3-shell/test/release-submission-manifest.spec.ts；bun run release:submission:manifest 生成 JSON；bun run release:acceptance ok true。

architectural_claims: external submission handoff is now machine-readable while cutover delivery remains the active lane
behavioral_changes: release:submission:manifest reads a packaged MV3 zip and emits artifact sha256, extension manifest summary, packaged file list, source commit, channel, and ready_for_upload state

data_model_changes.name: release submission manifest JSON
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Generated artifact only; not persisted in repo.

security_implications: No new extension permissions; command only reads local release artifact zip and writes local JSON handoff.
migration_notes: No runtime migration; external release packet now includes manifest generation before upload.
